cxu_object.claim: In a ranging regime at price $2071.55 with Bollinger at 49 percent and trend at -0.164 percent the human trader instructed observe-flat because I opened this trade because there was a sudden drop and a large spike in volume.  the high volume helped push the price down to where I hit the strike.  I added a take profit at $250 just so that i didn't miss the top, but the better way to do this would have been with a trailing stop loss once I am above my baseline plus fees.  once the momentum dies down it's hart to tell which way this will go, but I am inclined to be bullish - so I will hold through the chop.
